description: A comprehensive multi-tenant SaaS application built for tailoring shops to manage orders, customer measurements, financials, and offline-first synchronization.

architecture.frontend: React (Vite), TailwindCSS, TanStack Query, Dexie (IndexedDB), Lucide Icons
architecture.offline_strategy: Offline-first PWA approach. Dexie.js handles local storage. Background sync manager pushes queues and pulls server changes every 60s.

database_schema.User: SaaS Tenant (Shop Owner). Contains shop details, subscription tier, JWT tokens.
database_schema.Order: Core entity. Stores bill number, customer details, items, advance/balance, status, and measurement image.
database_schema.Customer: Unique by mobile number. Stores history of orders.
database_schema.ClothConfig: Shop-specific pricing for different cloth types.

functions: Manages global Auth state (JWT token in localStorage)
Handles Tab navigation (New Order, Dashboard, Customers, Analytics, Profile)
Initializes and listens to syncManager.js for offline/online events
Renders the main layout, sidebar, and hamburger menu

key_divs.main-content-area: Dynamic container rendering the active tab component

functions: Explains the SaaS features to potential customers
Displays pricing tiers (Basic, Premium, Enterprise)
Redirects to AuthPage for signup

key_divs.features-grid: Cards explaining offline mode, WhatsApp integration, etc.

functions: Handles Login and Registration
Communicates with /api/auth/login and /api/auth/register
Sets JWT token on success

key_divs.auth-card: Centered white container with form inputs
key_divs.form-fields: Email and password inputs with validation
key_divs.toggle-mode: Button switching between Login and Signup modes

functions: Captures new order details (items, prices, advance payment)
Auto-detects returning customers by mobile number
Provides a Canvas for drawing/writing measurement sheets
Generates printable PDF bills

key_divs.customer-details-card: Inputs for mobile number and name
key_divs.canvas-container: aspect-[4/3] drawing pad. Shows previous measurements if returning customer
key_divs.edit-unlock-slider: iOS-style slider to unlock a previous measurement sheet for editing
key_divs.order-items-table: Dynamic rows for cloth type, quantity, and price
key_divs.financials-summary: Calculates total, advance, and balance due
key_divs.bill-series-popup: Modal asking to link new order to previous bill suffix (e.g., -1, -2)

functions: HTML5 Canvas wrapper for drawing measurements
Supports undo/redo, colors, eraser, and resizing
Saves output as base64 webp image

key_divs.toolbar: Top bar with color swatches, brush sizes, and undo/clear actions
key_divs.canvas-wrapper: Contains the actual <canvas> element and a grid background

functions: Shows top KPIs (Total Orders, Undelivered, Today's Revenue)
Lists recent orders with search and filtering
Allows changing order status (Ready, Delivered, Undelivered)

key_divs.search-bar: Input to filter orders by bill number, phone, or name
key_divs.orders-table: List of orders with colored status badges
key_divs.action-buttons: Buttons inside table rows to update status or view details

functions: Lists all customers with their total order count
Shows selected customer's measurement sheet and past orders

key_divs.split-layout: Grid with sidebar (list) on left and details on right
key_divs.customer-details-pane: Right side showing measurement image and chronological order history

functions: Calculates monthly profit (Revenue minus Expenses)
Manages fixed expenses (rent, electricity) and dynamic custom expenses
Renders revenue charts

key_divs.financial-summary-cards: Revenue, Total Expenses, and Net Profit cards
key_divs.expenses-manager: Inputs for rent/electricity and a dynamic list for custom expenses
key_divs.charts-container: Renders Recharts bar/line graphs for daily/monthly trends

functions: Upload/update shop logo, name, and contact details
Configure custom default prices for cloth types (e.g., Shirt: ₹500)
Configure WhatsApp API integration

key_divs.cloth-pricing-config: Dynamic list to set base prices
key_divs.whatsapp-integration-card: Instructions and fields for Meta Cloud API integration

functions: Accessible only via /admin route by the platform owner
Lists all registered tenant shops
Shows platform-wide revenue and subscription statuses

key_divs.tenants-table: List of users, their database usage, and subscription tier

mechanics: pullServerChanges(): Fetches all records modified since last_sync_time and saves to Dexie.
syncPendingData(): Pushes all offline mutations (CREATE, UPDATE) from Dexie queue to server.
Triggers 'offline-sync-complete' event only when new data is pulled to refresh React Query cache without blocking the UI.
Abstracts Dexie DB calls into React hooks (useOrders, useCustomers, useDashboardStats).
Uses 'placeholderData' to immediately render Skeleton loaders while reading from Dexie.
Implements useMutation for creating/updating orders, which writes to local DB and adds to sync_queue.
